creator: se@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to wbe from comment #8)
I have tried to build calendar from your tar file on -CURRENT, but have run into many compile errors.

Since this is a mix of bug fixes and improvements, it is hard to review and test these individual changes. I had expected a series of patch sets, or at least a version that just fixes bugs and then patches that add new features.

I do understand that it is a lot of effort to perform such a split unless there is a commit history in the local work tree that allows to reproduce the phases of development (assuming that not all these changes have been worked on simultanously).
